title: LEGO Icons The Lord of the Rings: Barad-dûr Model, Movie Memorabilia Building Set for Adults, Gift Idea for Men & Women, Includes Sauron, Gothmog, Orc, Frodo, Sam and Gollum Minifigures 10333
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: LEGO Icons The Lord of the Rings: Barad-dûr model ⁠– Build a detailed fortress replica, with the towering Eye of Sauron high above Middle-earth
What's in the box – This Lord of the Rings LEGO set has 10 minifigures, including Sauron, Mouth of Sauron, Orc, Frodo, Sam and Gollum and Gothmog
Cool features ⁠– Automated black gate, illuminating Eye of Sauron, and modular design with detailed rooms like a forge, throne room, and prison
Armour accessories ⁠– This Lord of the Rings model features helmets for Sauron and Mouth of Sauron, The One Ring, light of Eärendil and Sauron's mace
Lord of the Rings gifts – This LEGO movie memorabilia building set makes a great gift for men and women fans of The Lord of the Rings film trilogy
Includes printed and digital building instructions – The LEGO Builder app offers a digital version of the instructions for this LEGO Icons set for adults
LEGO building sets for adults – This LEGO Icons project is part of the range of LEGO creative building sets designed specifically for adults
description: From the manufacturer Welcome to Barad-dûr Journey to Middle-earth with this LEGO Icons The Lord of the Rings: Barad-dûr model building set for adults. Authentic replica model Craft a meticulously detailed 5,471-piece replica of the ominous fortress towering high above Middle-earth. LEGO Icons The Lord of the Rings: Barad-dûr A striking centrepiece Create a captivating display for the home and office. Eye of Sauron Switch on the light brick to illuminate the Eye of Sauron. Detailed 5-level interior Rooms include the library, weapons forge and Sauron’s study. Packed with film details Rotate a dial to raise the prison’s orc cage. Sauron’s throne room Open the throne to reveal a hidden note. Includes 10 minifigures Create epic scenes with iconic film characters. A film-themed gift idea This LEGO Icons set makes a rewarding building project or gift for fans of the epic The Lord of the Rings film trilogy.

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Creative thinking, Emotional intelligence, Imagination development, Motor skills, Social skills
